digest.component_or_area: plan-review gate protocol guidance in CLAUDE.md and skill docs
propositions: The mandatory 'remediate all valid advisory findings' guidance in CLAUDE.md's plan-review protocol should be loosened to neutral judgment framing without discouraging advisory uptake.
The mandated advisory-remediation loop drove a 4+-round tail consuming ~60% of gate compute, with most remediation edits minting new findings.
BLOCK/blocking-verdict-must-remediate and 'Sign on every round' guidance must remain unchanged.
Two echoes of the mandate in rebar-implement and rebar-brainstorm SKILL.md must be softened to judgment framing while keeping their BLOCK-remediation instruction.
The rebar-janitor 'Remediation Plan' phase and rebar-implement's completion-verifier close gate (line 254) are deliberately left untouched.
Observation of advisory-uptake rate and rounds-to-pass is tracked on the parent epic's measurement AC, not this ticket.
